description_long: This object is a cylindrical cigarette with a white paper-wrapped body and a tan-colored filter at one end. The cigarette is slender and straight, with a smooth, unblemished surface and no visible branding or markings. The filter section is slightly shorter than the main white body and has a subtle color transition where it meets the paper. There are no signs of burning, charring, or ash at either end, indicating it is unused. The cigarette appears to be of standard commercial size, suitable for hand-held use. Its overall appearance is clean and typical of a manufactured cigarette.
description: A slender, white cigarette with a tan filter, smooth and unused, with no visible branding or burn marks.
description_view_0: Front view of the cigarette showing the full cylindrical shape with the tan filter clearly visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view of the cigarette, displaying the continuous white body and the tan filter at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the tan filter at the base and the white body above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the white cylindrical body and tan filter, consistent with other angles.
